title: Senior Instructional Designer at LinkedIn Learning India South Asia Partners
company: LinkedIn Learning India South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Senior Instructional Designer at LinkedIn Learning India South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
We at LinkedIn Learning India South Asia Partners are looking for an experienced Instructional Designer based out of Amritsar. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About LinkedIn Learning India South Asia Partners:
LinkedIn Learning India South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Support students with special educational needs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in E-learning

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with LinkedIn Learning India South Asia Partners!
